base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of star_world — a tile from 1990 super mario world. Star World 1-5 — hidden world accessed via star-exits. Unlocks Special World. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Star World 1-5 — hidden world accessed via star-exits. Unlocks Special World
